name: Jack Joseph
contentStyle: POV and sketch comedy. Relatable everyday scenarios. Group skits. Co-host: Low IQ Podcast.
formatFit: Skit series, POV comedy format, brand-integrated sketches
strategicNotes: Already in the Gymshark ecosystem — brand-ready. Natural lead for Pubity comedy skit series. TikTok scale gives Pubity growth in that space.

name: Cole Anderson-James
contentStyle: Character sketches — bouncers, teachers, EastEnders icons (Phil Mitchell, Shirley Carter). Original comedy format. Lip-sync to original sketches.
formatFit: Character-led skit series, comedy format co-production
strategicNotes: Original character mechanic is ownable and scalable. 2.7M TikTok is the key metric. Could front a Pubity character comedy format.

name: Italian Bach (Isaac Smith)
recent: TikTok Creator of the Year nominated 2024
contentStyle: Dry wit, relatable skits, cultural insight. 'Friends From Work' group channel. Co-hosts The Bach & Arthur Show (Spotify top 10).
brandDeals: TikTok Creator of the Year nominated 2024. Significant brand portfolio.
formatFit: Skit series, long form YouTube content, branded podcast/vodcast
strategicNotes: Insanity agency — Giselle has relationship with Insanity client lead. Biggest male creator on this list. YouTube channel = long form opportunity.

name: Loudogg Life
recent: 'Girl on a night out' skit went viral
contentStyle: Night out comedy skits. The 'girl on a night out' skit blew up. Lad culture, nightlife, events-adjacent content.
formatFit: Alcohol brand format, events/nightlife series, 'night out' skit comedy
strategicNotes: Night out skit virality = proven audience appetite for this content. Strong fit for alcohol brands, events platforms, sports/betting nightlife adjacent.

name: Henry Rowley
recent: Edinburgh Fringe sold out · Alexandra Palace + UK tour
contentStyle: Observational character comedy — 'the Soho House guy', 'the music guy at afters'. Edinburgh Fringe sold out. Alexandra Palace + UK tour.
formatFit: Character sketch series, observational comedy format, skit series
strategicNotes: Highly format-ready. Soho House guy / music afters characters have broad appeal. Edinburgh + touring = mainstream crossover happening. United Agents managed.

name: Ash Holme
recent: BBC Radio 1 early breakfast (Oct 2025) · Love Island Aftersun 2025 panellist
contentStyle: Comedy sketches, lifestyle, presenter. BBC Radio 1 early breakfast slot (Oct 2025). ITV2 Love Island Aftersun 2025 panellist.
brandDeals: eBay (Dear eBay — agony aunt format with Jack Remmington)
formatFit: Talent-led presenter format, duo skit series (with Jack Remmington), branded vodcast
strategicNotes: Presenter credentials + social comedy = rare. Part of Jack & Ash duo — one management conversation covers both assets + The Jack & Ash Show podcast.

name: Jack Remmington
recent: BBC Radio 1 · BAFTA red carpet digital host 2025
contentStyle: Presenter, cultural commentator, pop culture expert. BBC Radio 1. BAFTA red carpet digital host 2025.
brandDeals: eBay (Dear eBay format — agony aunt mechanic with Ash Holme)
formatFit: Presenter-led format, duo vodcast, cultural commentary series
strategicNotes: Part of Jack & Ash duo. Dear eBay format shows they can own original format concepts. One conversation = Jack + Ash + podcast.

name: Kimberley Cumberbatch
recent: 'Out of Office with Kim' podcast · intro available via Giselle (Bumble warm path)
contentStyle: South London social commentator, comedian, presenter. Hosts 'Out of Office with Kim' podcast. Has own original comedy format.
formatFit: Dating/relationship comedy format, branded skit series, podcast content
strategicNotes: INTRO AVAILABLE — Giselle knows someone with strong Bumble relationships. Disney = Pubity already has that in. Own format = understands format IP. Low cost, high upside.

name: Shelen
recent: 'Messy girl' British comedy — Garnier, Adidas actively buying the format
contentStyle: 'Messy girl' British comedy. Chaotic, relatable, authentically British female life. Strong UGC-feel brand content.
brandDeals: Nivea · Aperol · Benefit · Moth · Batiste · Tinder · Garnier · Adidas
formatFit: Messy Girl format series, branded lifestyle skits, beauty/FMCG content
strategicNotes: Brand portfolio is a Pubity commercial sweet spot. 'Messy girl' aesthetic is trending and brands (Garnier, Adidas) are actively buying it. Managed by Sevensix Agency.

name: Georgia Wood
contentStyle: Actress, comedian, LGBTQ+ advocate. Hilarious one-liners, relatable real-life situations. BBC Radio 1 Christmas Creator Takeover.
formatFit: Messy Girl format series, comedy skit series, lifestyle content
strategicNotes: Part of 'messy girl' British female comedy cohort with Shelen. TikTok growth is the key metric. LGBTQ+ advocacy adds demographic breadth. InterTalent managed.

name: GK Barry (Grace Keeling)
recent: Saving Grace podcast UK top 5 · Loose Women panellist · I'm A Celeb 2024 · UK tour 2025
contentStyle: Saving Grace podcast (UK top 5 Spotify). Loose Women panellist (youngest ever). I'm A Celebrity 2024. UK tour 2025.
formatFit: Podcast co-production, branded series, vodcast format
strategicNotes: Biggest female name on this list. Podcast partnership or branded content series > one-off post. Touring audience = rare paying fanbase for a social creator.

name: Christopher Hall
recent: 'Background Singers' series (50M+ views, 12M likes) · Kylie Minogue + Shania Twain + Gwen Stefani collabs
contentStyle: Comedian, dancer, character performer. 'Background Singers' series with sister (50M+ views, 12M likes). Stay Hydrated podcast.
brandDeals: Kylie Minogue · Shania Twain · Gwen Stefani collabs
formatFit: Character sketch series, music-comedy hybrid format, branded podcast
strategicNotes: Background Singers mechanic (consistent cast, new song) has 50M+ views = proven repeatable format. PBJ Management represented. Music industry connections unusual for social creator.

name: Disgrace Campbell
recent: Author 'Amazing Disgrace' · runs Disgraceful Club IRL events (NW London)
contentStyle: Stand-up comedian, author ('Amazing Disgrace'), podcaster ('Late to the Party'). Runs Disgraceful Club IRL events. NW London.
formatFit: IRL + social event format, comedy talk show, stand-up adjacent content
strategicNotes: Disgraceful Club events model = IRL + social crossover opportunity for brands. Stand-up background = excellent in longer formats. Strong editorial voice.

name: Eating with Tod
recent: Active food brand partnerships at 2M scale
contentStyle: London food reviews — restaurants, cafes, bakeries. 'If you can't take a date, take a mate' tagline. Very discoverable content.
brandDeals: Active food brand partnerships at 2M scale
formatFit: Talent-led food discovery series, branded food format, restaurant/QSR partnerships
strategicNotes: 2M IG = serious distribution asset for food brands. 'Date or mate' angle makes food content social and relatable. Top priority for food vertical.

name: Slater Chef (Ben Slater)
contentStyle: Recipe developer and food stylist. More editorial/aspirational food content. Clean, beautiful food aesthetics.
formatFit: Recipe/food styling format, FMCG brand content, QSR aspirational content
strategicNotes: More editorial feel than Tod — works for premium food brands wanting food styling credibility rather than street-level discovery.

name: Snacks to Try
recent: Format IP Pubity could replicate and own
contentStyle: M&S-adjacent snack and recipe content. Simple mechanic: find/recreate/review. Easy format to understand and replicate.
formatFit: Format IP to replicate for Pubity's own food page
strategicNotes: Giselle flagged this as a format Pubity could replicate and own. The mechanic (find/recreate/review snacks) is simple enough to build as original IP without needing to partner.

name: The Jack & Ash Show
recent: Built off Jack & Ash combined following + Radio 1 profile
contentStyle: Conversational podcast from the Jack & Ash duo. Built off combined social following and Radio 1 profile.
brandDeals: Podcast brand partnerships likely — strong commercial duo
formatFit: Branded podcast series, vodcast format, clip distribution
strategicNotes: One conversation with management covers Jack + Ash individually, the duo format, and the podcast. Three assets in one relationship.
